summary: The source contract restricts n to the twenty integers from 1 through 20, and descending backtracking has highly non-monotone first-solution work across that small domain, so it cannot support an honest factorial runtime-scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 1 through 20 inclusive

replacement_checks.evidence: Each recursion fixes the first empty position and consumes one unused value; a value above one has only the forced paired position index plus value, so recursion depth is at most n and the search tree is bounded by descending permutations of the n values.

Regression independently enumerates every valid sequence and proves lexicographic maximality for all n through 7, then verifies multiplicities, exact index distances, output length, and value range for every legal n through the maximum 20; the exact native source also has remote Accepted evidence.
